project_type: Next.js 15 app with React 19, Supabase, Stripe
verification_instructions: Run pnpm build and confirm it passes without errors
setup_instructions: PATH="/root/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.3/bin:$PATH" - pnpm is already installed, node_modules exist
environment_constraints: No test framework. Verification is build-only. Supabase environment variables are set for build but no actual DB connection in CI.
key_patterns: Supabase Realtime subscriptions via src/lib/supabase/realtime.ts (subscribeToMessages, unsubscribeChannel). Client supabase from src/lib/supabase/client.ts. Service client from src/lib/supabase/service.ts. API routes use createServiceClient for DB operations. ChatBubble and ChatInput are shared components. Admin chat already uses Realtime (see src/app/admin/conversations/[id]/page.tsx lines 98-120). eslint-disable comments used for 'any' type assertions on supabase queries.
directory_structure: src/app/ - Next.js app router pages and API routes. src/components/ - shared components. src/lib/ - utilities and supabase clients. src/types/ - TypeScript types.
